title: BDRY - November 7, 2023
summary: Shipping volatility is your friend… most of the time - Once again, the Capesize market has proven what shipping is China plays the leverage card once again - Faced with the potential of missing growth targets, China is once again Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
